DP.423.0000:
The Lost Tower is where the spirits
of departed Pokémon are put to rest.\f
Those that enjoyed long lives...
Those whose times were short...\f
All the departed Pokémon shall
find solace here...\f
It is good of you to have visited.
Here, take this Hidden Machine.\f
DP.423.0001:
To use that hidden move Strength...\f
...I’ve forgotten where exactly, but
you must visit a Pokémon Gym.
DP.423.0002:
That Fantina...
She’s a hard one to get a read on...\f
But she is the compassionate sort.
You know, she’s a regular visitor.
DP.423.0003:
Let me make your journey out of this
place less frightening. Take this.\f
DP.423.0004:
The Cleanse Tag... Let the first
Pokémon in your team hold it.\f
It will help keep wild Pokémon away
so you can leave unhindered.
